title: Vegetable Shortening Salsa Verde
description: A fresh, tender Uruguayan dish featuring vegetable shortening to add a unique texture and flavor profile, perfect for those midnight cravings.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup finely chopped bell peppers
ingredients.notes: Juicy, add a sweet note to the dish

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup finely chopped onions
ingredients.notes: Slightly sweet, adds depth of flavor

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons vegetable shortening (can substitute with neutral-flavored oil)
ingredients.notes: For a unique texture and slight richness

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lime
ingredients.notes: Fresh, adds brightness to the dish

ingredients.name: Optional: Fresh cilantro for garnish (to taste)
ingredients.notes: To enhance the freshness of the salsa

instructions: Wash and dry all vegetables thoroughly.
In a mixing bowl, combine finely chopped tomatoes, bell peppers, onions, and garlic. Mix well to ensure even distribution of flavors.
Add vegetable shortening or oil. Stir gently until combined with ingredients.
Squeeze the juice of one lime into the mixture. Let it sit for at least 10 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together.
Season with salt, adjusting according to taste. Mix well again.
If desired, garnish with fresh cilantro leaves before serving.
